rationale_overall: All eight positions are thesis-intact as of June 30, 2025. The nuclear wave received a fresh catalyst on June 3 (Constellation signed a 20-year PPA with Meta for the full output of the Clinton Clean Energy Center), reinforcing CEG. IONQ completed the Lightsynq acquisition in April, demonstrated photonic interconnection of two trapped-ion systems, and was selected for DARPA's Quantum Benchmarking Initiative — three execution signals in one quarter, holding the quantum slot. RKLB reported Q1 2025 revenue of $123M (+32% YoY) on May 8, keeping rockets intact. The AI names remain in early-to-mid surge: NVDA data-center revenue +73% YoY in fiscal Q1; GOOGL beat across the board April 24 with AI Overviews at 1.5B monthly users; MSFT AI run rate surpassed $13B. No holding shows a breach. The geopolitical and demographics waves lack specific pre-July 2025 buildup catalysts strong enough to displace a holding, especially given the profile's caution that defense names have already re-rated. Watchlist unchanged.
